description: This tutorial demonstrates how to create an idle game called Lumberjack on the Solana blockchain using the Clockwork tool. The game collects wood every 10 seconds and utilizes a thread to trigger transactions automatically. Viewers learn about initializing game data, transaction costs, and how to upgrade their lumberjack using collected resources.
topic_summary: Creating an idle game on Solana with Clockwork, focusing on transaction automation and resource management [t=0:48 - t=281:86].
